description: APED epic-context cache — produced by aped-story step-02, appended by aped-review at story→done, optionally extended by aped-discuss-epic (6.9.0+).

sections.heading: Implementation decisions
sections._note: 6.9.0 — optional section appended by aped-discuss-epic. forbid:false so SPIDR sub-axis schema can land later (cohort-3 / 6.10.0). Legacy caches without this section validate clean.

sections.heading: Previous stories — outcomes
sections._note: forbid_invented_sub_headings: false because aped-review appends '### Story {key} — done {ISO}' level-3 blocks here. Per-block schema (Decisions/Files/Contracts/Deviations) deferred to cohort-3 (6.10.0).
